title: 3 Idiots
overview: In the tradition of 'Ferris Bueller's Day Off' comes this refreshing comedy about a rebellious prankster with a crafty mind and a heart of gold. Rascal. Joker. Dreamer. Genius... You've never met a college student quite like 'Rancho.'

title: Dangal
overview: Mahavir Singh Phogat is a former wrestler who decides to fulfill his dream of winning a gold medal for his country by training his daughters for the Commonwealth Games despite the existing social stigmas.

title: Sholay
overview: Jai and Veeru, two ex-convicts, are hired by Thakur Baldev Singh, a retired policeman, to help him nab Gabbar Singh, a notorious dacoit, who has spread terror in the village of Ramgarh.

title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion (Hindi)
overview: When Shiva, the son of Bahubali, learns about his heritage, he begins to look for answers. His story is juxtaposed with past events that unfolded in the Mahishmati Kingdom.

title: RRR (Hindi)
overview: A fictional history of two legendary revolutionaries' journey away from home before they began fighting for their country in the 1920s.

title: Tom & Jerry (Hindi Dubbed)
overview: Tom the cat and Jerry the mouse get kicked out of their home and relocate to a fancy New York hotel, where a scrappy employee named Kayla will lose her job if she can’t evict Jerry before a high-profile wedding.

title: Avengers: Endgame (Hindi Dubbed)
overview: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the universe is in ruins due to the efforts of the Mad Titan, Thanos. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers must assemble once more in order to undo Thanos' actions.

title: Deadpool & Wolverine (Hindi Dubbed)
overview: A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life with his days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. But when his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home (Hindi Dubbed)
overview: Peter Parker is unmasked and no longer able to separate his normal life from the high-stakes of being a super-hero. When he asks for help from Doctor Strange the stakes become even more dangerous.

title: KGF: Chapter 2 (Hindi)
overview: The blood-soaked land of Kolar Gold Fields (KGF) has a new overlord now - Rocky, whose name strikes fear in the heart of his foes. His allies look up to Rocky as their savior, the government sees him as a threat.

title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts (Hindi Dubbed)
overview: When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, Optimus Prime and the Autobots must team up with a powerful faction known as the Maximals.

title: Avatar: The Way of Water (Hindi Dubbed)
overview: Set more than a decade after the events of the first film, learn the story of the Sully family (Jake, Neytiri, and their kids), the trouble that follows them, the lengths they go to keep each other safe.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once (Hindi Concept)
overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the versions of herself from the multiverse.

title: Inside Out 2 (Hindi Dubbed)
overview: Teenager Riley's mind headquarters is undergoing a sudden demolition to make room for something entirely unexpected: new Emotions! Joy, Sadness, Anger, Fear and Disgust, who’ve long been running a successful operation.

title: Oppenheimer (Hindi Dubbed)
overview: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer's role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.
